title: Synthetic Market Scenario Stress-Test for Signal Robustness
summary: Build a lightweight synthetic scenario generator using bootstrapped and permuted historical yfinance data to test how the 9-dimension signal model performs under stressed market conditions (flash crash, volatility spike, momentum reversal). Bloch (2023) formally demonstrates that standard backtesting overfits to a single historical path, and that probabilistic 'futuretesting' across multiple synthetic paths yields dramatically more reliable strategy assessments before live deployment.
expected_impact: SSRN Futuretesting paper (Bloch 2023) shows backtesting on a single historical path dramatically overestimates strategy robustness; distributional stress testing across synthetic scenarios reduces probability of live-trading blowups. Expected reduction in tail-event drawdowns of 15-25% by identifying signal combinations that fail under adversarial conditions.
